metadata.name: seedStore
metadata.description: Async. (state) -> { seeded, skipped }. Populate the segment-store under plastron/ from the in-memory boot segments (the kernel closure). Idempotent: a name@version already in the index is skipped. Host-called after createInitialState; NOT auto-fired at boot (would make every transient State touch disk). Writes via segment-store.putRaw, so it can seed role:kernel segments. node-fs in CLI, OPFS in browser, via file-store.
